ogTitle: Beaconsfield Upper vs Bealiba: Climate Safety

heading: Beaconsfield Upper vs Bealiba — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Beaconsfield Upper, Victoria and Bealiba, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Beaconsfield Upper has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Bealiba (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Beaconsfield Upper or Bealiba safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Beaconsfield Upper has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Bealiba scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Beaconsfield Upper scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Bealiba scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Beaconsfield Upper or Bealiba?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Beaconsfield Upper has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.28% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
